skills.label: Write Email
skills.description: Draft, send, and triage email communication.

skills.label: Write Doc
skills.description: Create, edit, and organize working docs.

skills.label: Read Slack Channels
skills.description: List Slack channels visible to the bot. Runs immediately in Slack (no confirmation).

skills.label: Read Slack Messages
skills.description: Read recent messages from a named Slack channel. Runs immediately in Slack (no confirmation).

skills.label: Write Slack
skills.description: Create channels and invite requesters to channels for onboarding setup. Requires explicit Confirm/Cancel before any write.

skills.label: Read Company
skills.description: Summarize this channel from cached Slack history in Redis (hourly digest). Runs immediately in Slack (no confirmation).

skills.label: Read Skills
skills.description: List team skills from the capability catalog (who has which skills). Runs immediately in Slack (no confirmation).

skills.label: Read Twitter
skills.description: Search Twitter by keyword and fetch high-impression tweets (not the platform trend list). Runs immediately in Slack (no confirmation).

skills.label: Read Trends
skills.description: Fetch the current Twitter/X trend list (not keyword search). Runs immediately in Slack (no confirmation).
